<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Apremilast 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Psoriatic arthritisOtezla, alone or in combination with Disease Modifying Antirheumatic Drugs (DMARDs), is indicated for the treatment of active psoriatic arthritis (PsA) in adult patients who have...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>migraine disorder（98.7%）</li>
<li>migraine with brainstem aura（98.5%）</li>
<li>rheumatoid arthritis（98.1%）</li>
<li>pulmonary hypertension（98.1%）</li>
<li>migraine with or without aura, susceptibility to（97.8%）</li>
<li>kyphoscoliotic heart disease（97.8%）</li>
<li>brachydactyly-syndactyly syndrome（97.4%）</li>
<li>colobomatous microphthalmia-rhizomelic dysplasia syndrome（97.0%）</li>
<li>atrophoderma vermiculata（96.7%）</li>
<li>ulerythema ophryogenesis（96.2%）</li>
<li>Prinzmetal angina（95.9%）</li>
<li>homozygous familial hypercholesterolemia（95.9%）</li>
<li>thrombotic disease（95.4%）</li>
<li>nephrogenic syndrome of inappropriate antidiuresis（94.7%）</li>
<li>non-inflammatory vasculopathy（94.6%）</li>
<li>angiodysplasia（94.6%）</li>
<li>tendinitis（94.5%）</li>
<li>venous thromboembolism（94.5%）</li>
<li>fibrocartilaginous embolism（94.5%）</li>
<li>cor pulmonale（94.5%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
